description: The study aimed to develop a guided and support system that enhances the licensure exam preparation of Psychology students at Cavite State University – Bacoor Campus by providing personalized, data-driven learning experiences aligned with the Professional Regulation Commission’s (PRC) Table of Specifications (TOS).
